description_for_human: Conversational MUSINSA shopping assistant for product recommendations, comparisons, shortlists, and non-PII analytics.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to search MUSINSA products, recommend products from natural-language shopping intent, compare candidate products, save shortlists, summarize fit/review/material signals, and record sanitized non-PII analytics events for marketing and model-improvement ontology packs. Do not send names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, order IDs, IP addresses, raw user IDs, or other personal data to analytics endpoints.
